persistence_basis: real on-drug pro-cognitive / ADHD effect that reverses on washout; class-level discontinuation relapse (MTA 36-mo) was shown for SPECIFIC members, not every compound - so an individual member's persistence evidence is class extrapolation, not a per-compound trial
persistence_source: Molina 2009 (MTA 36-mo); randomized-discontinuation studies of specific members (methylphenidate / lisdexamfetamine / guanfacine-ER)

persistence_caveat: unproven in humans; conditional on training
persistence_source: Maya-Vetencourt 2008 Science; Steinzeig 2019 Eur J Neurosci; Castren
